title: ixia ramulosa
intro: Ixia ramulosa, also known as the Red-Eyed Fairy, is a species of flowering plant in the Iridaceae family. Native to South Africa, it is a bulbous perennial that produces vibrant orange flowers with reddish-brown markings. Traditionally, Ixia ramulosa has been used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and expectorant properties. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or tincture to help alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and to boost the immune system.
